purpose: Hand reaching down from above toward product. First-person POV.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: First-person POV photography of {gender_specific} hand reaching down from upper frame toward {product_descriptor} on warm wooden or marble surface, soft natural daylight from upper right, real skin texture, hand caught mid-reach with relaxed fingers, ambient surroundings blurred, shot on 50mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark, no face, no full body {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T18. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default skin tone medium warm Mediterranean Arab. Male brands: subtle watch or ring. Female brands: optional subtle henna at thumb base. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 2 per week.
